title: lyonia villosa var. pubescens
intro: Lyonia villosa var. pubescens, also known as hairy fruited Lyonia, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its small, white flowers and hairy fruit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia villosa var. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral activity. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
